subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, et al, spoken on 1919-12-28
subcodes.first_line: The hair of these men has been made white in the Cause of God both during the days of the Blessed Beauty and afterwards.
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom
